package.name: go2_teleop
package.description:
Rust — keyboard teleoperation node for the Unitree Go2. Reads raw terminal keypresses (no ncurses dependency) and publishes /cmd_vel (geometry_msgs/Twist) and /go2/cmd_behavior (std_msgs/String).
Key bindings: w/s — forward / backward velocity a/d — turn left / right SPACE — stop (zero velocity) 1 — command: stand 2 — command: trot 3 — command: patrol 0 — command: idle e — emergency stop c — clear e-stop q — quit node
